summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas Recap 12-16-23
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recapping the latest Star Atlas news.
Metaverse Nomads #125 Star Atlas and Honeyland w/ Co-founder Filbert Steiner
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their Star Atlas livestream.
Townhall #41
Star Atlas TV posted a video reply of the latest Star Atlas Townhall.
Quick RECAP: Star Atlas Townhall #41 – End of Year 2023
RahMega posted a video recapping the Star Atlas Townhall.
STAR ATLAS #214 LABS VERSION 2
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about version 2 of SAGE Labs.
The Atlas Brew #93
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Atlas Brew #93: The Last Brew of the Year – TLDR
TLDR posted a recap of the latest Atlas Brew.
STAR ATLAS #215 SCORE EMISSIONS CUT BY 33%
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about the changes to the Star Atlas economy.
Star Atlas – SCORE Reduction and Economic Planning w/Chris S.
The Hologram News Network posted a video about economic planning in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Economic Report 2023 Q4
Star Atlas published their latest economic report.
Star Atlas – Release 2.1.9 Trailer
Star Atlas posted a video trailer of release 2.1.9 of the Showroom.
